case_title: LEW FAMILY TRUST et al VS. NORMAN SIMPSON et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, NORMAN
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-29-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEW FAMILY TRUST FONG, MORIA TRUSTEE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, NORMAN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, NORMAN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT NORMAN SIMPSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT OF POSSESSION AND FOR RESTITUTION. THE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT WAS DULY SERVED BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE BY NOTICE AND MAILING ON SEPTEMBER 1, 2007 AT A TIME WHEN HE WAS CONCERNED WITH AND OR CARING FOR HIS MOTHER WHO WAS SERIOUSLY ILL AND DIED IN PORTLAND, MAINE ON SEPTEMBER 4, 2007. THE DEFAULT WAS TAKEN ON SEPTEMBER 20, 2007. MODIFICATIONS: THE MOTION TO RECALL THE WRIT OF POSSESSION AND FOR RESTITUTION IS ORDERED CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 29, 2007 FOR FURTHER HEARING. DEFENDANT'S SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF BE SERVED AND FILED BY NOVEMBER 27, 2007. OPPOSING BRIEF BE SERVED AND FILED BY NOVEMBER 28, 2007. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: PATRICK HEARD, CSR # 11055

LAW AND MOTION 505, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT OF POSSESSION AND FOR RESTITUTION; CONTINUED FROM NOV-30-2007 TO COURT TRIAL AT DEC-06-2007, 3:00 PM IN DEPT. 505 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession And For Restitution;
Off Calendar Nov-30-2007 Continued To Dec-06-07 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession And For Restitution;
Off Calendar Nov-29-2007 Continued To Nov-30-07 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT NORMAN SIMPSON'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession And For Restitution IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 505 TO BE HEARD ON NOVEMBER 30, 2007 AT 2PM. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB/LB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession And For Restitution;
Off Calendar Nov-21-2007 Continued To Nov-29-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
BRENDAN CONLEY, ESQ., (415)692-6811, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, NORMAN SIMPSON
ARNOLD W. EVJE, II, ESQ., (415)495-8800, FOR PLAINTIFFS/OPPOSING PARTIES LEW FAMILY TRUST, ET. AL.

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH MODIFICATIONS AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NORMAN SIMPSON'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession And For Restitution. THE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT WAS DULY SERVED BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE BY NOTICE AND MAILING ON SEPTEMBER 1, 2007 AT A TIME WHEN HE WAS CONCERNED WITH AND OR CARING FOR HIS MOTHER WHO WAS SERIOUSLY ILL AND DIED IN PORTLAND, MAINE ON SEPTEMBER 4, 2007. THE DEFAULT WAS TAKEN ON SEPTEMBER 20, 2007. MODIFICATIONS: THE MOTION TO RECALL THE WRIT OF POSSESSION AND FOR RESTITUTION IS ORDERED CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 29, 2007 FOR FURTHER HEARING. DEFENDANT'S SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF BE SERVED AND FILED BY NOVEMBER 27, 2007. OPPOSING BRIEF BE SERVED AND FILED BY NOVEMBER 28, 2007. Judge: John K. Stewart, Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR # 11055
